top_signals.title: Congress is best chance to stop Trump 'lawfare' fund, attorneys say
top_signals.summary: The Department of Justice has set up a $1.8 billion fund that will purportedly compensate victims of prosecutorial overreach under the Biden administration.

top_signals.title: Freeport says Grasberg on track for full production by end of 2027
top_signals.summary: Grasberg is now running at 50% of capacity and is expected to reach 65% later this year, Freeport Indonesia's CEO says.
